privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real CT Cranium DICOM dataset (case 0051) downloaded directly from the official InVesalius GitHub releases. The required output Wavefront OBJ model must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/skull_surface.obj and contain at least 1,000 vertices, while the surgical view PNG screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/surgical_view.png with a minimum size of 51,200 bytes. All metadata claims exactly match the verification scripts.
